use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF TREATING MULTIPLE SCLEROSIS BY ADMINISTERING SIPONIMOD USING A TITRATION SCHEME TO REACH A MAINTENANCE DOSE

TREATMENT OF RELAPSING FORMS OF MULTIPLE SCLEROSIS (MS), TO INCLUDE CLINICALLY ISOLATED SYNDROME, RELAPSING-REMITTING DISEASE, AND ACTIVE SECONDARY PROGRESSIVE DISEASE, IN ADULTS RECEIVING OR WHO MAY RECEIVE A BETA-BLOCKER TREATMENT
